titleStmt.title: SII 30.92: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 92. (A.R. No. 169 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District. Veṅkaṭēśa Perumāḷ temple-on the same wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 5: 1017 A.D.

summary.p: This record begins with the praśasti of Parakēsarivarmaṉ Rājēndra chōḻa I. It records the gift of 90 sheep for a lamp by certain Veḷḷāḷa Naḍaiyāḍi alias Maṇināgaṉ, a resident of Kūḍalūr to the temple of Tirumukkūḍal-āḻvār in Madurāntakachchaturvēdimaṅgalam, which was an autonomous village (taṉiyūr) in Jayaṅgoṇḍa-sōḻamaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟ(ṟa)ceyap pāvaiyum cirttaṉi celviyum taṉperun=teviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭu
tiyuḷ Ūḻiyuḷ Iṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarvaṉavelipaṭar vaṉavāci cuḷḷiccūḷ matiḷ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭa
kkamu māpporun=taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakesaripaṉmarāṉa śrīrājendracoḻa devaṟkku yāṇṭu 5 Āvatu jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu taṉiyūr śrīmadhurān=takaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu tirumukkūṭal Āḻvārkku kūṭalūr Irukku
m veḷḷāḷa naṭaiyāṭi maṇinākaṉ vaitta tirunan=tāviḷakkukkum cāvāmuvāp perāṭāka vaitta Āṭu toṇṇū
ṟṟu 7 kaikkoṇṭu cantrātittavaṟ(ṟa) nicatam UḻakkuvākkaRead- uḻakkākatirumuṟṟatte koṭuceṉṟu Aṭṭakkaṭavo(m)māṉom ..
Digital edition of SII 30.92 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
